description: Agent-org session discipline for Grok: org-lane-mark marks sessions that dispatch Solo workers or arm timers (PreToolUse on solo MCP spawn/timer tools); org-conduct-refresh re-injects role-skill re-read order after compaction (SessionStart compact matcher) — summaries keep facts not conduct; org-stop-gate blocks a marked session's first Stop with anti-idle checklist. All inert if never spawned workers. Commands use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time substitution (nested ${VAR:-default} expands empty against process env).
